title: bromus pannonicus subsp. pannonicus
intro: Bromus pannonicus subsp. pannonicus, also known as Pannonian brome, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Bromus pannonicus subsp. pannonicus include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
